title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still pondering how Agnes Tachyon's running
has changed, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She insists that I only worry about today's results
and exits the waiting room without offering any
explanation.
